message:
feat(workflows/handlers): tick 215 HandleSessionStartContext::execute_step_cx override + lookup_cass_hints_with_cx helper (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Second per-impl Workflow migration following tick 214's
HandleSessionEnd pattern. Adds cx-first routing to
HandleSessionStartContext — a 2-step workflow that:
- Checks an audit-log cooldown (read storage)
- Calls cass subprocess N times for query candidates
- Records an audit action for the decision (write storage)

Two additions:

1. **`lookup_cass_hints_with_cx(cx, storage, pane_id, trigger)`**:
   cx-first sibling of lookup_cass_hints. Routes:
   - `storage.get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` for pane lookup
   - `cass.search_with_cx(cx, query, &options)` for each query candidate
   - Adds a per-query `cx.checkpoint()` so a cancel fired during
     the previous cass subprocess call lands BEFORE the next
     query runs — without this, a cancelled caller would wait
     through all N query candidates' full cass timeout.

2. **`execute_step_cx` override** on HandleSessionStartContext.
   Routes:
   - Step 0: `storage.get_audit_actions_with_cx(cx, query)` for
     cooldown check (read)
   - Step 1: `lookup_cass_hints_with_cx` (per-query cx threading)
   - Step 1: `storage.record_audit_action_with_cx(cx, audit)` for
     audit write (→ send_with_cx mpsc backpressure)
   - Pre-step `cx.checkpoint()` gates entry between steps

Legacy `execute_step` and `lookup_cass_hints` preserved
verbatim.

Tracing annotation: `explicit_cx = true` on info/warn/error spans
so operators can distinguish legacy vs cx-first code paths.

Verification: 1168 / 1168 workflows:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Per-impl Workflow migration progress: 2/8+ handlers.rs impls now
have `execute_step_cx` overrides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
